creator: yssu@CCCA.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
Origin author of cgiparse has been fix the bug which
	I reported in ports/5891 in the newest version of cgiparse.

	Please remove the patch reported in ports/5891 and apply
	the following patch. Thank you in advance.

Fix: 1. Remove any patch files under www/cgiparse/patches

2. Apply the following patch
	
-DISTNAME=      cgiparse-0.8d
+DISTNAME=      cgiparse-0.8e
 CATEGORIES=    devel
 MASTER_SITES=  http://resnet.uoregon.edu/~gurney_j/
